title: Kagurabachi Anime Trailer Exceeds 6 Million Views in Under 24 Hours
content: The trailer for the newly-announced KAGURABACHI anime adaptation has surpassed 6 million views in under 24 hours on the official platforms. The long-awaited anime announcement arrived on April 27 , alongside the production details.
author: Anime Corner

title: Shaula Introduces Herself in Re:ZERO Season 4 Episode 4 Preview
content: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- Season 4 has revealed the Episode 4 (Episode 70 overall) preview ahead of its April 29, 2026 premiere. Season 4 began on April 8 and ranked first in all three our weekly polls of the season so far . Studio WHITE FOX is animating.
author: Anime Corner

title: Clevatess Season 2 Reveals New Trailer, Key Visual, Cast
content: Clevatess Season 2 anime has revealed its second key visual, along with a new trailer and additional cast members. As previously confirmed , the anime will premiere in July 2026. Studio Lay-duce is returning to handle the animation production.
author: Anime Corner

title: Ushiro no Shōmen Kamui-san TV Anime's Teaser Unveils Main Cast & Staff, July Debut
content: The official website for the television anime of author Eroki and artist Shinko Konoshiro 's Ushiro no Shōmen Kamui-san (Kamui-san Directly Behind You) manga opened on Tuesday and unveiled the anime's teaser promotional video, key visual, main cast and staff members, and its July premiere.
author: ANN

title: Clevatess II Anime's 2nd Video Unveils More Cast, Myth & Roid's Ending Song
content: The staff for Clevatess II -Majū no Ō to Itsuwari no Yūsha Denshō- ( Clevatess II -The King of Magical Beasts and the Legend of the False Hero-), the second anime season based on Yuji Iwahara 's Clevatess -Majū no Ō to Akago to Shikabane no Yūsha- ( Clevatess - The King of Magical Beasts, the Baby, and the Corpse…
author: ANN

title: Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You Anime Reveals 4 More Cast Members, June 3 Limited Advance Streaming on Abema Japan
content: Update: The Comic Natalie website has removed its article on this anime. ANN's original article follows below: The staff for the television anime of Jinushi 's Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You ( Super no Ura de Yani Sū Futari ) manga revealed a new key visual and four additional cast members on Monday.
author: ANN

title: KAMUI: He’s Behind You Erotic Horror Anime Reveals Key Visual, Teaser PV, July 2026 Premiere
content: Ushiro no Shomen Kamui-san (KAMUI: He’s Behind You) erotic horror anime has revealed its key visual, teaser trailer, and a July 2026 release date. Studios ZERO-G and Z G-R are in charge of the animation.
author: Anime Corner

title: ODDTAXI Writer Kazuya Konomoto's Spinner Bait Suspense Manga Gets Live-Action Show
content: NBCUniversal Entertainment Japan announced on Tuesday that ODDTAXI writer Kazuya Konomoto 's coming-of-age crime suspense manga series Spinner Bait will receive a live-action television series adaptation on Fuji TV in June. The series will also be available on streaming services in Japan like FOD and TVer .
author: ANN

title: KILL BLUE Reveals Creditless Ending Video Featuring ED by RIIZE
content: KILL BLUE anime has released its creditless ending animation video, featuring the ED song “KILL SHOT” by RIIZE. Studio CUE is in charge of the animation production, with Hiro Kaburagi ( Kimi ni Todoke , GREAT PRETENDER ) as the director.
author: Anime Corner

title: 10 Anime Coming to Netflix in May 2026
content: Netflix is all set for its May calendar and has quite an exciting list of anime coming to the platform for the first time. While there are only two new anime series being added to the platform this month, Netflix confirmed the return of some of the biggest anime ever.
author: ComicBook
